2604.19508.title: Bangla Key2Text: Text Generation from Keywords for a Low Resource Language
2604.19508.paper_summary: This paper introduces \textit{Bangla Key2Text}, a large-scale dataset of $2.6$ million Bangla keyword--text pairs designed for keyword-driven text generation in a low-resource language. The dataset is constructed using a BERT-based keyword extraction pipeline applied to millions of Bangla news texts, transforming raw articles into structured keyword--text pairs suitable for supervised learning. To establish baseline performance on this new benchmark, we fine-tune two sequence-to-sequence models, \texttt{mT5} and \texttt{BanglaT5}, and evaluate them using multiple automatic metrics and human judgments. Experimental results show that task-specific fine-tuning substantially improves keyword-conditioned text generation in Bangla compared to zero-shot large language models. The dataset, trained models, and code are publicly released to support future research in Bangla natural language generation and keyword-to-text generation tasks.
2604.19508.paper_summary_zh: 這篇論文介紹了\textit{Bangla Key2Text}，這是一個包含260萬個孟加拉語關鍵字-文本對的大型數據集，旨在用於低資源語言中的關鍵字驅動文本生成。該數據集是通過對數百萬篇孟加拉語新聞文本應用基於BERT的關鍵字提取管道構建的，將原始文章轉換為適合監督學習的結構化關鍵字-文本對。為了在這個新基準上建立基準性能，我們微調了兩個序列到序列模型，\texttt{mT5}和\texttt{BanglaT5}，並使用多個自動指標和人工評估進行評估。實驗結果顯示，與零樣本大型語言模型相比，任務特定的微調顯著改善了孟加拉語中的關鍵字條件文本生成。該數據集、訓練模型和代碼已公開發布，以支持未來在孟加拉語自然語言生成和關鍵字到文本生成任務中的研究。
2604.19508.author: Tonmoy Talukder et.al.
